title: ardisia brackenridgei
intro: Ardisia brackenridgei, also known as Ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii, belonging to the family Myrsinaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ardisia brackenridgei include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ardisia brackenridgei can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
